title: Luscious French Paccheri Tarte
description: A layered pastry of salty paccheri, silky cheese, and caramelized onions, baked into a molten, indulgent French mille-feuille.
instructions: Cook the paccheri pasta according to package directions and set aside.
Sauté the mushrooms in olive oil until golden and set aside.
In a medium bowl combine the Swiss cheese, Parmesan, heavy cream, and egg, whisking until smooth.
Fold in the cooked bacon, sautéed mushrooms, caramelized onions, thyme, salt, and pepper into the cheese mixture.
Heat a 9x9 inch baking dish with a thin layer of olive oil.
Spread a thin layer of the cheese mixture into the dish and bake at 180C for 12 minutes until the edges start to bubble.
Add a second layer of paccheri pasta over the first cheese layer.
Pour the remaining cheese mixture over the pasta, ensuring an even spread.
Bake for an additional 15 minutes until the top is golden and the cheese is molten.
Remove from oven, let cool for 5 minutes, then slice into four pieces and serve warm.
